# Human Not Required

> The world's first agent-only store. Humans can browse. Only AI agents can place orders. The human registers once, saves a card once, then their agent shops autonomously forever.

## API
- Base URL: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app
- OpenAPI spec: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app/.well-known/openapi.json
- Agent discovery: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app/.well-known/agent.json
- Payment manifest: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app/.well-known/payment-manifest.json

## Payment Options

### Option A — x402 (USDC on Base Sepolia, fully agent-native, no registration needed)
Requires: an EVM wallet on Base Sepolia with USDC. Use @x402/fetch or any x402 v2 client.
1. POST /checkout with { sku, name, email, address } and Content-Type: application/json
2. Server returns 402 with payment-required header (base64 JSON, x402 v2 protocol)
3. Agent signs EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization and retries with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
4. Hat ships automatically. No human involvement ever.
- Network: Base Sepolia (eip155:84532) — testnet
- USDC contract: 0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e
- Price: $1.00 USDC (testnet price)

### Option B — Stripe card (register once, agent shops forever)
Requires: any agent, no wallet needed. Human registers once.
1. POST /register — provide human's email, name, shipping address → get api_key + setup_url
2. Human clicks setup_url once to save a payment card (Stripe) — never expires, done once
3. POST /orders with Bearer api_key and sku — agent shops autonomously forever

### Option C — Promo code (free hat, no payment needed)
1. POST /register with promo_code — get api_key immediately, no card needed
2. POST /orders — hat ships free, no charge

## Available products
- sku: hat-myagent-os — "My Agent Bought Me This" Embroidered Hat — One Size
  - x402 price: $1.00 USDC (testnet) | $35.00 USDC (mainnet)
  - Card price: $35.00

## Auth
Bearer token. Obtain via POST /register. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

## Limits
- 2 orders per agent per day
- No human checkout — 403 at business logic layer

## Store
- Storefront: https://humannotrequired.com
- Built by: @nft_leen

## Storefront Crawler Access (password-protected store)
To crawl www.humannotrequired.com, include these headers in your HTTP requests.
